name: mc-test client agent (Fabric)
description: Thin Fabric client shim for the mc-test in-process driver: hosts an MCTP WebSocket server and exposes the client's Screen/widget tree, keyboard, and framebuffer as MCTP primitives. All wire logic lives in io.mctest:mc-test-agent-core; this mod only supplies the entrypoint and the Yarn-mapped ClientBridge (mappings/Names.java).
